[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100010 3
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 11000000 2
5 11000101 4
6 11100101 5
7 01100011 4

01 10 11000101 4 match 5
12 21 11100101 5 match 6
23 32 01100011 4 match 7
34 43 01000000 1
45 54 01000000 1
56 65 01010101 4
67 76 01100000 2
70 07 11000000 2 match 4

02 20 11000101 4 match 5
13 31 01100001 3
24 42 01000000 1
35 53 01001011 4
46 64 01000000 1
57 75 11000010 3
60 06 01000101 3
71 17 11100000 3

14 41 01000000 1

50 05 11000101 4 match 5
61 16 01100101 4
72 27 11100010 4

04 40 01000000 1

37 73 01100010 3 match 0
